evalAfter: (async () => { const r={}; const btn=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS/i.test(el.textContent||'')); if(btn)btn.click(); await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,2500)); try{MOS.nav('catalogo');}catch(e){} await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,5000)); MOS.abrirAnalitica('IDPRO0000063'); await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,5000)); r.errorProducto=(document.body.textContent||'').includes('Cannot read'); r.grupoSec=!document.getElementById('anGrupoSec')?.classList.contains('hidden'); r.tabs=[...document.querySelectorAll('#anGrupoSec button')].map(b=>b.textContent.trim()).slice(0,5); return r; })()
